economic_notes: Subsidiaries include Metepenagiag Heritage Park Inc., 651738 N.B. Ltd. (Riverside Entertainment Centre), and Metepenagiag Economic Ventures Corporation. Nation is economically dependent on funding from Indigenous and Northern Affairs Canada and Health Canada.
notes: Nation consolidates three subsidiaries: Metepenagiag Heritage Park Inc., 651738 N.B. Ltd. (Riverside Entertainment Centre), and Metepenagiag Economic Ventures Corporation. Cash position is negative (bank overdraft of $2,783,350). Net debt position of $20,540,690. Promissory notes payable of $1,836,550 exist in addition to CMHC long-term debt. Large 'Other' revenue line of $15,644,552 and 'Other' expense line of $14,713,811 suggest significant unconsolidated or undisclosed revenue/expense categories not broken down further. Funds on deposit with INAC appear on both asset and liability sides of balance sheet.
